items.title: Terraform MCP Server Enables AI Assistants to Interact with Terraform Infrastructure
items.summaryShort: Terraform MCP Server Enables AI Assistants to Interact with Terraform Infrastructure. HashiCorp has announced the general availability of the Terraform MCP Server, an open-source MCP server that enables agents to integrate with Terraform Re

items.title: AWS Introduces CDK Mixins for Composable Infrastructure Abstractions
items.summaryShort: AWS Introduces CDK Mixins for Composable Infrastructure Abstractions. AWS recently announced CDK Mixins, a new AWS CDK feature that lets developers add reusable capabilities like security, monitoring, and configuration to AWS resources.

items.title: WebMCP Standard Proposal for Agentic Web Actuation Now Available in Chrome (Origin Trials)
items.summaryShort: WebMCP Standard Proposal for Agentic Web Actuation Now Available in Chrome (Origin Trials). Google recently announced that WebMCP is entering origin trials in Chrome 149.

items.title: Google Launches Colab CLI for Developers, Automation, and AI Agents
items.summaryShort: Google Launches Colab CLI for Developers, Automation, and AI Agents. Google has announced the Google Colab CLI, a command-line tool that allows developers and AI agents to interact with remote Colab runtimes directly from a local terminal.

items.title: Slack Eliminates SSH in EMR Pipelines, Migrates 700+ Jobs to Rest-Based Architecture
items.summaryShort: Slack Eliminates SSH in EMR Pipelines, Migrates 700+ Jobs to Rest-Based Architecture. Slack modernized its data platform by replacing SSH based execution in Amazon EMR pipelines with a REST driven orchestration layer called Quarry.

items.title: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future
items.summaryShort: As Anthropic suspends access to new models, India debates its AI future. Tech leaders debate whether the Anthropic episode is a wake-up call for India’s AI ambitions.

items.title: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing's demand
items.summaryShort: Meta reportedly moves to unwind $2B Manus deal after Beijing's demand. Meta starts dismantling its $2 billion Manus acquisition after Beijing ordered the deal reversed.

items.title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
items.summaryShort: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations. Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.
